result.stdout:
The external FluentMigrator runner that integrates into the .NET Core CLI tooling

Usage: dotnet-fm [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Execute FluentMigrator actions

Commands:
  list          List stuff
  migrate       Apply migrations
  rollback      Rollback last migration
  validate      Validations

Run 'dotnet-fm [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
The external FluentMigrator runner that integrates into the .NET Core CLI tooling

Usage: dotnet-fm [command] [options]

Options:

  migrate       Apply migrations
  rollback      Rollback last migration
  validate      Validations

Run 'dotnet-fm [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
List stuff

Usage: dotnet-fm list [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  migrations    List migrations
  processors    List processors

Run 'list [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
List stuff

Usage: dotnet-fm list [command] [options]

Options:

Commands:

Run 'list [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
List migrations

Usage: dotnet-fm list migrations [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help                                  Show help information.
  -c|--connection <CONNECTION_STRING_OR_NAME>   The name of the connection
                                                string (falls back to machine
                                                name) or the connection string
                                                itself to the server and
                                                database you want to execute
                                                your migrations against.
  -m|--transaction-mode <MODE>                  Overrides the transaction
                                                behavior of migrations, so that
                                                all migrations to be executed
                                                will run in one transaction.
                                                Allowed values are: Migration,
                                                Session.
                                                Default value is: Migration.
  --no-connection                               Indicates that migrations will
                                                be generated without consulting
                                                a target database. Should only
                                                be used when generating an
                                                output file.
  -p|--processor <PROCESSOR_NAME>               The kind of database you are
                                                migrating against. Available
                                                choices can be shown with "list
                                                processors".
  -s|--processor-switches <PROCESSOR_SWITCHES>  Provider specific switches.
  --preview                                     Only output the migration steps
                                                - do not execute them. Add the
                                                `--verbose` switch to also see
                                                the SQL statements. Default is
                                                false.
  -V|--verbose                                  Show the SQL statements
                                                generated and execution time in
                                                the console. Default is false.
  --profile <PROFILE>                           The profile to run after
                                                executing migrations.
  --timeout <TIMEOUT_SEC>                       Overrides the default database
                                                command timeout of 30 seconds.
                                                Default value is: 0.
  -o|--output[:<FILENAME>]                      Output generated SQL to a file.
                                                Default is no output. A filename
                                                may be specified, otherwise
                                                [targetAssemblyName].sql is the
                                                default.
  -a|--assembly <ASSEMBLY_NAME>                 The assemblies containing the
                                                migrations you want to execute.
  -n|--namespace <NAMESPACE>                    The namespace contains the
                                                migrations you want to run.
                                                Default is all migrations found
                                                within the Target Assembly will
                                                be run.
  --nested                                      Whether migrations in nested
                                                namespaces should be included.
                                                Used in conjunction with the
                                                namespace option.
  --start-version                               The specific version to start
                                                migrating from. Only used when
                                                NoConnection is true. Default is
                                                0.
  --working-directory <WORKING_DIRECTORY>       The directory to load SQL
                                                scripts specified by migrations
                                                from.
  -t|--tag                                      Filters the migrations to be run
                                                by tag.
  -b|--allow-breaking-changes                   Allows execution of migrations
                                                marked as breaking changes.
  --default-schema-name                         Set default schema name for
                                                VersionInfo table and the
                                                migrations.
  --strip                                       Strip comments from the SQL
                                                scripts. Default is true.
  --include-untagged-migrations                 Include untagged migrations.
  --include-untagged-maintenances               Include untagged maintenances.
  --allowDirtyAssemblies                        Allows dirty assemblies.

  -m|--transaction-mode <MODE>                  Overrides the transaction

                                                Allowed values are: Migration,
                                                Session.

  --no-connection                               Indicates that migrations will
                                                be generated without consulting
                                                a target database. Should only
                                                be used when generating an
                                                output file.
  -p|--processor <PROCESSOR_NAME>               The kind of database you are
                                                migrating against. Available
                                                choices can be shown with "list
                                                processors".
  -s|--processor-switches <PROCESSOR_SWITCHES>  Provider specific switches.
  --preview                                     Only output the migration steps
                                                - do not execute them. Add the
                                                `--verbose` switch to also see
                                                the SQL statements. Default is
                                                false.

  --profile <PROFILE>                           The profile to run after
                                                executing migrations.
  --timeout <TIMEOUT_SEC>                       Overrides the default database
                                                command timeout of 30 seconds.
                                                Default value is: 0.
  -o|--output[:<FILENAME>]                      Output generated SQL to a file.

                                                [targetAssemblyName].sql is the
                                                default.
  -a|--assembly <ASSEMBLY_NAME>                 The assemblies containing the

  -n|--namespace <NAMESPACE>                    The namespace contains the
                                                migrations you want to run.
                                                Default is all migrations found
                                                within the Target Assembly will
                                                be run.
  --nested                                      Whether migrations in nested
                                                namespaces should be included.
                                                Used in conjunction with the
                                                namespace option.
  --start-version                               The specific version to start
                                                migrating from. Only used when
                                                NoConnection is true. Default is
                                                0.
  --working-directory <WORKING_DIRECTORY>       The directory to load SQL
                                                scripts specified by migrations
                                                from.
  -t|--tag                                      Filters the migrations to be run
                                                by tag.
  -b|--allow-breaking-changes                   Allows execution of migrations
                                                marked as breaking changes.
  --default-schema-name                         Set default schema name for
                                                VersionInfo table and the
                                                migrations.
  --strip                                       Strip comments from the SQL
                                                scripts. Default is true.
  --include-untagged-migrations                 Include untagged migrations.
  --include-untagged-maintenances               Include untagged maintenances.
  --allowDirtyAssemblies                        Allows dirty assemblies.

Commands:
  down                                          Revert migrations
  up                                            Apply migrations

Run 'migrate [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

  --nested                                      Whether migrations in nested

                                                scripts. Default is true.
  --include-untagged-migrations                 Include untagged migrations.
  --include-untagged-maintenances               Include untagged maintenances.
  --allowDirtyAssemblies                        Allows dirty assemblies.

Commands:
  all                                           Rollback all migrations
  by                                            Rollback migrations
  to                                            Rollback migrations up to a
                                                given version

Run 'rollback [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

                                                choices can be shown with "list
                                                processors".
  -s|--processor-switches <PROCESSOR_SWITCHES>  Provider specific switches.
  --preview                                     Only output the migration steps
                                                - do not execute them. Add the
                                                `--verbose` switch to also see
                                                the SQL statements. Default is
                                                false.
  -V|--verbose                                  Show the SQL statements
                                                generated and execution time in
                                                the console. Default is false.
  --profile <PROFILE>                           The profile to run after
                                                executing migrations.
  --timeout <TIMEOUT_SEC>                       Overrides the default database
                                                command timeout of 30 seconds.
                                                Default value is: 0.
  -o|--output[:<FILENAME>]                      Output generated SQL to a file.
                                                Default is no output. A filename
                                                may be specified, otherwise
                                                [targetAssemblyName].sql is the
                                                default.
  -a|--assembly <ASSEMBLY_NAME>                 The assemblies containing the
                                                migrations you want to execute.
  -n|--namespace <NAMESPACE>                    The namespace contains the
                                                migrations you want to run.
                                                Default is all migrations found
                                                within the Target Assembly will
                                                be run.
  --nested                                      Whether migrations in nested
                                                namespaces should be included.
                                                Used in conjunction with the
                                                namespace option.
  --start-version                               The specific version to start
                                                migrating from. Only used when
                                                NoConnection is true. Default is
                                                0.
  --working-directory <WORKING_DIRECTORY>       The directory to load SQL
                                                scripts specified by migrations
                                                from.
  -t|--tag                                      Filters the migrations to be run
                                                by tag.
  -b|--allow-breaking-changes                   Allows execution of migrations
                                                marked as breaking changes.
  --default-schema-name                         Set default schema name for
                                                VersionInfo table and the
                                                migrations.
  --strip                                       Strip comments from the SQL
                                                scripts. Default is true.
  --include-untagged-migrations                 Include untagged migrations.
  --include-untagged-maintenances               Include untagged maintenances.
  --allowDirtyAssemblies                        Allows dirty assemblies.

options.description: Allows execution of migrations marked as breaking changes.
Allows dirty assemblies.
The assemblies containing the migrations you want to execute.
The name of the connection string (falls back to machine name) or the connection string itself to the server and database you want to execute your migrations against.
Set default schema name for VersionInfo table and the migrations.
Include untagged maintenances.
The namespace contains the migrations you want to run. Default is all migrations found within the Target Assembly will be run.
Whether migrations in nested namespaces should be included. Used in conjunction with the namespace option.
Indicates that migrations will be generated without consulting a target database. Should only be used when generating an output file.
Output generated SQL to a file. Default is no output. A filename may be specified, otherwise [targetAssemblyName].sql is the default.
Only output the migration steps - do not execute them. Add the `--verbose` switch to also see the SQL statements. Default is false.
The kind of database you are migrating against. Available choices can be shown with "list processors".
Provider specific switches.
The profile to run after executing migrations.
The specific version to start migrating from. Only used when NoConnection is true. Default is 0.
Filters the migrations to be run by tag.
Overrides the default database command timeout of 30 seconds.
Overrides the transaction behavior of migrations, so that all migrations to be executed will run in one transaction.
Show the SQL statements generated and execution time in the console. Default is false.
The directory to load SQL scripts specified by migrations from.
